description:
Resolve all defects found in the Deep Audit v2 for `hx-dialog`.
Source: `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-dialog/AUDIT.md`

**Summary:** 28 defects — 3 P0, 6 P1, 13 P2, 6 P3

### P0 — Critical
- [ ] [P0] No focus restoration to trigger element on dialog close (WCAG 2.4.3)
- [ ] [P0] `WithCustomHeader` Storybook story renders with no accessible name
- [ ] [P0] (Cross-reference) `WithCustomHeader` story produces unlabelled dialog

Reference the AUDIT.md in the component directory for full details and code locations.
title: Audit Fix: hx-dialog
